---
title: Summaries, Integrations, and Agent Reliability
date: 2025-12-22
tag: Platform
---

**Automatic Task Summaries - December 1, 2025.** Tasks now receive auto-generated summaries that capture key points across messages, emails, and agent interactions. This helps teammates pick up a case quickly without reading full thread history.

**SharePoint Integration - December 9, 2025.** The assistant can search SharePoint document libraries directly from Interloom while working a case, bringing policies, templates, and reference files into workflow context without tool switching.

**MCP Tool Integrations - December 19, 2025.** Interloom now supports the Model Context Protocol (MCP), allowing organizations to extend agent capabilities with custom integrations to internal APIs, proprietary systems, and third-party services.

**Agent Reasoning and Reliability - December 22, 2025.** Conversations now show a transparent "thinking" step for complex tasks, making agent reasoning easier to follow and course-correct. Reliability has also improved for multi-step execution: agents can chain tools, complete full sequences, and stop cleanly when the task is resolved.
